title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Yes Bank Global Group

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Yes Bank Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the Yes Bank Global Group family as a Financial Analyst in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Yes Bank Global Group:
Yes Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank Global Group!
